name: I'm on a raft
hints: You're on a raft at sea! The raft is hard to steer.
PADD to paddle the raft toward the atoll you saw from the stone head.
The raft eventually reaches the atoll. You need to have built the raft first using logs and vines.
PADD=sets course for atoll (room 15). Hard to steer but it works.

effects: Message: Hard to steer this thing!

notes: On a raft at sea. PADD to steer toward atoll (15). Must have built raft from logs and vines first.
